sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70426" key="neourge/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νε-ουργέω</orth>, <sense id="n70426.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">invent new things,</tr_> <abbr TEIform="abbr">f.l. in</abbr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:3:51" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.51</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
